fixes.description: Fix IPTG_absent: exogenous_supply=0.0 is a no-op on the source formula Node=gm+exog. Use gene_modifier=0.0 to zero IPTG.
fixes.reason: Source-node formula is additive. Default gm=1.0, exog=0.0. Setting exog=0.0 explicitly leaves IPTG at 1.0 (baseline). To set IPTG=0 (absent), must use gene_modifier=0.0.
fixes.biological_justification: IPTG absent means no lacI de-repression, so any IPTG-inducible promoters on DXS/IDI/CRTEBI stay off. Encoded as IPTG=0.
Arabinose absent means no pBAD induction; any araBAD-controlled enzymes stay off. Encoded as Arabinose=0.

fixes.description: Fix Glucose_carbon baseline: this test is the control (glucose-fed baseline), should have no perturbation. Previous encoding set Glucose exog=1.0, doubling it.
fixes.reason: The network baseline assumes glucose as carbon source; this test just confirms baseline. Any perturbation here creates spurious signal.
fixes.biological_justification: T055 is a control condition matching WT baseline. Expected=unchanged is satisfied by empty perturbation list.

fixes.description: Fix Xylose_carbon: switch Glucose to gene_modifier=0.0 (absent) so the switch is represented.
fixes.reason: Glucose exog=0.0 was a no-op, so Glucose remained at baseline=1.0 while Xylose was doubled. The carbon-source switch wasn't actually encoded.
fixes.biological_justification: Xylose sole carbon source: Glucose=0, Xylose=1 (baseline of the Xylose source). Lowering total C-source activation of G3P predicts modest decrease, matching expected=decreased.

fixes.description: Fix Temperature_28: use gene_modifier=0.0 to represent low temperature.
fixes.reason: Same no-op issue. Temperature exog=0.0 leaves Temperature=1.0. Low-temp encoding requires gm=0.0.
fixes.biological_justification: 28C is lower than the baseline 30-37C convention. Temperature node has Temperature->Lycopene_Titer(-1), so low Temperature relieves inhibition -> predicts increased, matching expected.

fixes.description: Fix Temperature_shift_37to25: gene_modifier=0.0 for the post-shift low-temp state.
fixes.biological_justification: 37 -> 25C shift represents movement to a low-temperature production phase; same reasoning as T059.

fixes.reason: exog=0.3 made Oxygen_Level=1.3 (HIGHER than baseline) which is backwards. Microaerobic = reduced oxygen = gm=0.3.
fixes.biological_justification: Microaerobic growth has lower dissolved oxygen than the aerobic baseline (1.0).

fixes.description: Fix CrtE_Pagglomerans_OE_noIPTG: IPTG component must use gene_modifier=0.0 so the 'no IPTG' part of the test is actually encoded.
fixes.reason: IPTG exog=0.0 was a no-op, so the test was effectively equivalent to CrtE OE WITH IPTG. The 'no IPTG' distinguishing feature is lost.
fixes.biological_justification: P.agglomerans CrtE is expressed from a constitutive promoter (not IPTG-controlled). The test probes whether constitutive CrtE OE in an IPTG-naive background increases lycopene. Encoded: CRTE gm=2.0 (OE) AND IPTG gm=0.0 (no induction of endogenous IPTG-controlled genes).
